ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Dialogue is relevant and consistent with persona but could be more natural in flow, slightly lowering overall quality score due to forced context relevance.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Baseline response lacks both the necessary personality and any semblance of engagement with player, resulting in low scores across all categories except naturalness which is unaffected by context.
